data.title: Chainalysis plans to expand onchain investigations with automation for non-technical teams. No custom code required.
data.description: The new feature enables teams with no technical background to perform onchain investigations and compliance analyses independently, eliminating the need for custom coding.

data.title: United Airlines to release Q4 earnings on Jan 20, expected to report $2.94 EPS. Revenue forecasted at $15.34B, up from $14.7B last year.
data.description: United Airlines Holdings, Inc. will announce its fourth-quarter earnings on Tuesday, Jan. 20, after the market closes. Analysts predict earnings of $2.94 per share, a decrease from $3.26 per share in the previous year. The projected quarterly revenue for United Airlines is $15.34 billion, an increase from $14.7 billion last year. Recently, Boeing Company and United Airlines collaborated to test a new digital communications system on a 737-8 jet to enhance flight operations. United Airlines’ stock price dropped by 2.2% to $113.49 at market close on Friday. For further details, refer to the full report on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Rockwell Medical stock jumps on stronger-than-expected sales projections: Q4 sales $18.6M, FY revenue $69.5M.
data.description: Rockwell Medical, Inc. saw a surge in its stock price on Tuesday following the release of preliminary financial results for the three months and twelve months up to December 31, 2025. The company anticipates fourth-quarter sales to reach around $18.6 million, surpassing the market expectation of $16.55 million. The projected full-year revenue stands at approximately $69.5 million. Additionally, the company is looking at an improved gross margin for the fourth quarter of 2025. For more details, refer to the complete article on the Benzinga.com platform.

data.title: State Farm wins 5 medals, Allstate and USAA get 4 each in Corporate Insight’s P&C Insurance Monitor Awards.
data.description: State Farm has emerged as the top performer with five medals in total, while Allstate and USAA have each secured four medals across seven digital experience categories. This data comes from Corporate Insight (CI), a prominent provider of competitive intelligence and customer experience research within the financial industry. The results highlight State Farm's dominance in digital experience, while Allstate and USAA also demonstrated strong performance across various categories. The findings were unveiled in New York on January 20, 2026.

data.title: Build-A-Bear's Heartwarming Hugs plush back in stock after 9 months for National Hug Day celebration.
data.description: After a nine-month absence, the popular Heartwarming Hugs weighted plush is once again available for purchase. This product is offered by Build-A-Bear Workshop, a well-known brand recognized for its commitment to spreading joy and positivity. The company's mission of "adding a little more heart to life" resonates with customers. The Heartwarming Hugs plush will be restocked in time for National Hug Day tomorrow, providing individuals with the opportunity to celebrate by sharing affection and kindness.

data.title: MBAK Energy Solutions, Inc. appoints new Chief Strategist and Business Development Manager for Middle East and North Africa region.
data.description: MBAK Energy Solutions, Inc. (OTC:MBAK) has appointed a new Chief Strategist/Business Development Officer along with a Business Development Manager for the Middle East - North region. This move is aimed at enhancing the company's strategic initiatives and business growth in that area. The appointment of these key positions signifies MBAK's focus on expanding its presence and operations, marking a significant development for the company.

data.title: Vietnam Data Center Market valued at USD 1.04 billion in 2025, projected to reach USD 3.18 billion by 2031 with 20.48% CAGR.
data.description: The latest report on the Vietnam Data Center Market from ResearchAndMarkets.com highlights the significant growth opportunities in the industry. In 2025, the market was valued at USD 1.04 billion, and it is expected to reach USD 3.18 billion by 2031, indicating a notable CAGR of 20.48%. Vietnam has emerged as the fastest-growing data center market in the region, establishing itself as a key hub for cloud and AI infrastructure. This growth trend underscores the country's increasing importance in the tech sector.

data.title: Koryx Copper closes $46M bought deal financing and $5M Namibian private placement.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has hit a record low of 3.5%, down from the previous rate of 4.2%. This decrease represents a significant improvement in the job market, with over 250,000 new jobs being created in the last quarter. Additionally, the report highlighted a rise in average hourly earnings by 2.5%, indicating a positive trend in wage growth. Experts attribute this positive shift to various factors, including increased consumer spending and business investments. Overall, the latest data suggests a strong and growing economy with promising opportunities for job seekers.

data.title: Real estate veterans Anne Arnold & Ammie Archer join forces to form premier Brunswick County team on Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: In Brunswick County, North Carolina on January 20, 2026, renowned real estate agents Anne Arnold and Ammie Archer have joined forces to establish the Anne Arnold & Ammie Archer Real Estate Team. This collaboration brings together two highly accomplished professionals in the industry.

data.title: Washington investing $2.5B in securing critical minerals. Structural changes in capital markets observed.
data.description: A press release from Ares Strategic Mining Inc. in Vancouver, BC on Jan. 20, 2026, indicated that there are changes in the North American capital markets as bipartisan Congressional proposals discuss establishing a $2.5 billion Strategic Resilience Reserve.

data.title: Global mining sector sees record margins, top-tier firms report low All-In Sustaining Costs (AISC) in 2026.
data.description: Announced by RUA GOLD Inc. based in Vancouver, BC on January 20, 2026, the current update reveals that the global mining industry is experiencing significant changes. This includes top-tier companies reaching record high margins due to expanding producer costs. Presently, these leading firms are disclosing All-In Sustaining Costs (AISC) as part of this structural realignment in the industry. This development showcases the growing profitability within the mining sector.

data.title: Wearable tech market to reach $176.77B by 2030, growing at 15.9% CAGR from $84.53B in 2025 - MarketsandMarkets™.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of January 20, 2026, research from MarketsandMarkets™ indicates significant growth in the Wearable Technology Market. Projections show a rise to USD 176.77 billion by 2030, up from USD 84.53 billion in 2025, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 15.9% during this forecast period. The report includes an analysis across 195 market data Tables and 95 Figures, highlighting the sector's potential expansion in the coming years.

data.title: MAIA Biotech progresses Ateganosine cancer treatment, targeting 2026 clinical milestones for Phase 3 NSCLC trial with high efficacy.
data.description: There is a strong chance of technical success in the pivotal Phase 3 trial due to exceptional efficacy data for treating third-line non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). The data suggest promising outcomes for patients, with high effectiveness rates in the study. This news indicates a significant advancement in medical research and treatment, potentially offering new hope to those affected by NSCLC.

data.title: Saleo introduces AI Demo Agent offering 24/7 autonomous product demos in multiple languages for B2B, enhancing user experience.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, the prominent AI-native demo platform Saleo unveiled its latest offering, the AI Demo Agent. This innovative agent is capable of providing fully conversational, autonomous product demonstrations in multiple languages around the clock. Created to deliver unlimited access to dynamic demos, the AI Demo Agent is set to revolutionize the way products are showcased.

data.title: PR Newswire's Amplify™ named finalist for 2026 PRWeek Awards US in Best AI Platform category. Highlighting enhanced customer platform with integrated AI tools.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, PR Newswire was announced as a finalist for the 2026 PRWeek Awards US in the Best AI Platform category. This acknowledgment showcases the company's innovative customer platform, PR Newswire Amplify™, that incorporates AI tools throughout various essential points of operation. This recognition showcases the company's commitment to utilizing advanced technology in its services.

data.title: Andromeda Ventures launching at SpaceCom | Space Congress 2026, focusing on dual-use tech. #VentureCapital #SpaceTech
data.description: On January 20, 2026, a venture capital firm called Andromeda Ventures unveiled its new platform aimed at supporting mission-critical, dual-use technologies that enhance infrastructure, security, and human capabilities on Earth. The focus is on fostering sustainable advancements in these areas.

data.title: Global dihydromyrcenol market valued at USD 911.9 million in 2025, projected to reach USD 1.86 billion by 2035 with 7.4% CAGR.
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, as of January 20, 2026, reports indicate that the worldwide market for dihydromyrcenol is valued at approximately USD 911.9 million in 2025. Projections suggest that this market is expected to expand significantly, reaching approximately USD 1,862.1 million by the year 2035. This growth is anticipated to occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.4% throughout the forecast period.
